description: Final context package output from C9 before reaching C1 (MAL). Governed boundary.

zones.description: Ordered list of zone dicts with zone_type, position, token_count, trust_tier, compressed, chunks

protection_zones_intact.description: Must be true for governed boundary pass

budget_utilization.description: 0.0-1.0 normal, up to 1.5 allows slight overflow before escalation

trust_violations.description: Must be 0 to pass governed boundary
